brand_identity.name: Occium
brand_identity.tagline: The New Standard in Digital Excellence
brand_identity.description: A high-end digital product studio blending organic aesthetics with technical precision. We build serene, powerful software.

design_principles.interaction_philosophy: Fluid & Weighty. Elements should feel like they are floating in a viscous medium (GSAP). Interactions should be snappy but smooth (Framer Motion).

typography.rules: Headings should be crisp and tightly tracked. Body text should have generous line height for readability. Contrast is key: White text on Dark Glass.

colors.usage_rules: Use full-screen atmospheric images as the base. Place content inside 'Glass Cards' with the `glass_dark` background. Text inside glass MUST be white/light grey.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-white/20 transition-all duration-300

cards.glass: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 md:p-12 shadow-2xl
cards.solid: bg-white text-black rounded-2xl p-8 border border-gray-200

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:outline-none focus:border-white/30 transition-colors

motion.philosophy: Cinematic and Fluid. Avoid harsh cuts.

libraries.gsap: Use for ScrollTrigger, Parallax Backgrounds, and Complex Timelines.
libraries.framer_motion: Use for Component Entry, Hover States, Modals, and Page Transitions.

guidelines.scroll: Parallax effect on background images (y: -20%). Soft scale-up of images on visibility.

tech_implementation.gsap_setup: Register ScrollTrigger plugin in `useEffect`. Use `useGSAP` hook if available or `useLayoutEffect`.
tech_implementation.framer_setup: Wrap page content in `<AnimatePresence mode='wait'>`. Use `layout` prop for smooth resizing.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: The default theme is DARK GLASS on WARM NATURE background.
3. LAYOUT: Create a `Layout` component that handles the background image and the glass container overlay.
4. HERO: The Hero section must have the 'Sunrise' image as a fixed background with parallax. The text should float over it in a glass card.
5. NAVIGATION: Floating Glass Navbar at the top.
6. TESTING: Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid`.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
